channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two paving slabs are dangerously protruding above the level of other pavement., 13th March
item.description:
Two complete concrete paving slabs between the properties wall and the grass verge are jutting up above the level of the remaining slabs. I've tripped over them once and I imagine others have done so also.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodhurst Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major pot whole, 13th March
item.description:
3rd lane heading east before the Marylebone high street right turn lane. Major Pot whole could cause vehicle damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marylebone Road, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White graffiti on brick wall in Railway Avenue, 13th March
item.description:
White graffiti on brick wall in Railway Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Railway Avenue, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with license plate EK54EGJ left abandoned, 13th March
item.description:
It is difficult for us to take out van out and bring it back. From footages we saw how the scrap people have dumped it in front of our house. So removing that would be helpful for us.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 13th March
item.description:
Street light at the T of Vicarage Grove is not working.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerbside pothole - approx 4 metre in length, 13th March
item.description:
Pothole has been here for over 2 months and needs to be repaired

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pines Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large 30 inch potholes, 13th March
item.description:
The situation on Aldersgate Street is completely out of control. I have seen less crater on the moon. City of London need to fix this ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glasshouse Yard, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin & abandoned shopping trolleys, 13th March
item.description:
Please empty the bin and remove shopping trolleys asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brocklebank Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken wheelie bin, 13th March
item.description:
A broken wheelie bin has again been left on the street and is now full of all sorts of rubbish.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Orleans Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Line bikes at Peninsula Park bus stop, 13th March
item.description:
Please remove them asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brocklebank Road, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supermarket trolley, 13th March
item.description:
Has been dumped on the street outside garages.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, High View Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wait Button for Traffic Lights Not Working, 13th March
item.description:
Only one side of the traffic light buttons is currently working. The button on the side of the road with the DIY/bakery doesn't respond when pressed. On the other side, it responds as usual.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112B, Westmount Road, Well Hall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 21 Christchurch Avenue Nw6 7qp, 13th March
item.description:
4 x 6 packs of laughing gas cannisters/ nitrous oxide

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Tree needs pruning - large branches falling onto property and pavement, 13th March
item.description:
The public tree outside 50 Kings Avenue is old and quite weak. Large branches are falling into the private garden and onto the pavement below. It needs significant pruning to improve health and avoid fall from the tree canopy.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thanes water blocking the pavement, 13th March
item.description:
Thames water are currently doing roadworks on Longmead Drive. However, the barriers they have put up obstruct a huge chunk of pavement on both sides of the road as they are placing them on the pavement rather than in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Longmead Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and refuse piling outside house, 13th March
item.description:
Rubbish and refuse piling outside house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 94 Brondesbury villas, 13th March
item.description:
Plant large

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Urgent: Severe Potholes and Road Damage – Plumstead High Street (Outside Expo Shop), 13th March
item.description:
I am reporting significant road surface damage and multiple deep potholes located on the main carriageway directly in front of the Expo International shop . The depth and sharpness of these potholes pose a high risk of damage to tyres and suspension for passing vehicles.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped chair and a bench

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 13th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
